title: vernonia cubensis subsp. cajalbanensis
intro: Vernonia cubensis subsp. cajalbanensis is a subspecies of plant belonging to the genus Vernonia, native to the Philippines. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory infections. Vernonia cubensis subsp. cajalbanensis can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used as a topical treatment for skin conditions and wounds.
